ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the weather station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the weather station */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect data */,
  "data_collection_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather station where the data was collected */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month the data was collected */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day the data was collected */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour the data was collected */,
  "minute" INTEGER /* Minute the data was collected */,
  "second" INTEGER /* Second the data was collected */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dataset */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was created */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wind_speed_data" (
  "wind_speed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wind speed data point */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the wind speed data belongs to */,
  "wind_speed_2m" REAL /* Wind speed at 2m height */,
  "wind_speed_10m" REAL /* Wind speed at 10m height */,
  "wind_speed_5m" REAL /* Wind speed at 5m height */,
  "wind_speed_15m" REAL /* Wind speed at 15m height */,
  "wind_speed_20m" REAL /* Wind speed at 20m height */,
  "wind_speed_quality_flag" TEXT /* Quality flag for wind speed data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wind_speed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wind_speed_data_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wind_direction_data" (
  "wind_direction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wind direction data point */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the wind direction data belongs to */,
  "wind_direction_2m" INTEGER /* Wind direction at 2m height */,
  "wind_direction_10m" INTEGER /* Wind direction at 10m height */,
  "wind_direction_5m" INTEGER /* Wind direction at 5m height */,
  "wind_direction_15m" INTEGER /* Wind direction at 15m height */,
  "wind_direction_20m" INTEGER /* Wind direction at 20m height */,
  "wind_direction_quality_flag" TEXT /* Quality flag for wind direction data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wind_direction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wind_direction_data_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pressure_data" (
  "pressure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pressure data point */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the pressure data belongs to */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Pressure reading */,
  "pressure_quality_flag" TEXT /* Quality flag for pressure data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pressure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pressure_data_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "humidity_data" (
  "humidity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each humidity data point */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the humidity data belongs to */,
  "humidity_2m" INTEGER /* Humidity at 2m height */,
  "humidity_5m" INTEGER /* Humidity at 5m height */,
  "humidity_15m" INTEGER /* Humidity at 15m height */,
  "humidity_20m" INTEGER /* Humidity at 20m height */,
  "humidity_quality_flag" TEXT /* Quality flag for humidity data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("humidity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_humidity_data_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "temperature_data" (
  "temperature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each temperature data point */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the temperature data belongs to */,
  "temperature_2m" REAL /* Temperature at 2m height */,
  "temperature_10m" REAL /* Temperature at 10m height */,
  "temperature_top" REAL /* Temperature at top height */,
  "temperature_5m" REAL /* Temperature at 5m height */,
  "temperature_15m" REAL /* Temperature at 15m height */,
  "temperature_20m" REAL /* Temperature at 20m height */,
  "temperature_quality_flag" TEXT /* Quality flag for temperature data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("temperature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_temperature_data_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "precipitation_data" (
  "precipitation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each precipitation data point */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the precipitation data belongs to */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation reading */,
  "precipitation_quality_flag" TEXT /* Quality flag for precipitation data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("precipitation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_precipitation_data_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flags" (
  "flag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flag */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the flag belongs to */,
  "flag" INTEGER /* Flag value */,
  "flag_type" TEXT /* Type of flag */,
  "flag_description" TEXT /* Description of the flag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flags_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the dataset */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the data file */,
  "file_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the data file for integrity verification */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the readme file */,
  "file_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the readme file for integrity verification */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the version belongs to */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "released_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who released this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_released_by FOREIGN KEY ("released_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)
